Off Calendar Dec-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT ANGELO DELFIN'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment. Granted. Defendant demonstrates mistake and excusable neglect. The law favors adjudication on the merits. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
